info.title: NexHealth API
info.description: NexHealth API provides patient engagement and practice management capabilities for healthcare providers. Covers patient records, appointments, scheduling, providers, locations, insurance, forms, payments, communications, and EHR synchronization.

get.description: Returns available time slots for booking.

post.description: Create a payment request for a patient.
Send a message to a patient.
Trigger patient data sync with the EHR.
